description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every push to any branch and on every pull request to any branch. The workflow consists of four jobs: flake8, mypy, test, and coveralls. The flake8 job checks code style with Flake8, the mypy job checks types with Mypy, the test job runs tests with pytest on multiple OS and Python versions, and the coveralls job notifies Coveralls that the parallel build is finished.
